project.name: Shotpack Template Starter
project.textPolicy: Readable text and logos are added in Remotion only.
project.editPolicy: Keep edits restrained, cinematic, and product-first.
project.protagonistPolicy: One hero product per scene, with hands or silhouettes only when needed.
project.body: Lightweight starter manifest for the repository template.
project.artistNotes: Run the pipeline to sync your real manifest and media into public/shotpack-sample/.
project.referenceNotes: Bundled media was removed from the template to keep clone size small.

scenes.objective: Replace this starter scene by running the pipeline or syncing your own local assets.
scenes.prompt: Use project.yaml or project.pixverse.yaml to generate your first real shotpack.
